# output.Segment { #tslai.output.Segment }

```python
tslai.output.Segment(left, right, posterior, status)
```

A contiguous span carrying one soft ancestry posterior.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**left, right**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Half-open genomic interval ``[left, right)`` the segment covers.

<code>[**posterior**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K,)`` posterior over ancestry states on ``[left, right)``.

<code>[**status**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   :data:`INFORMATIVE` or :data:`MISSING_INFO` — the latter tags an isolated span where the tree carries no information and ``posterior`` is the prior ``π`` fallback, distinct from a 50-50 uncertain call (CLAUDE.md §4.2).
